api.description: Read environment values such as widget size and parameters.

api.description: Device hardware, screen, battery, disk space, and appearance helpers.

api.title: $storage
api.description: Key-value storage backed by app group UserDefaults.

api.title: $health
api.description: Read-only HealthKit access for steps, active energy, and heart rate.

api.title: $system
api.description: System and app metadata, locale, calendar, memory, uptime, power, and CPU info.

api.title: $location
api.description: Core Location access for current coordinates and authorization status. Options are optional; accuracy defaults to reduced.
methods: current({ timeout?, timeoutMs?, accuracy?, purposeKey?, maxAge?, maxAgeMs? }?)

components.title: Live Activity
Chart
Frame Attributes
components.example:
// 
// ScriptWidget 
// https://xnu.app/scriptwidget
// 
// Usage for component attribute frame
// 

/*

 frame="max"
 frame="max,topLeading"
 frame="10,20"
 frame="10,20,topLeading"
 
 frame="max,20"
 frame="10,max"
 frame="max,20,topLeading"
 frame="10,max,topLeading"


 the "topLeading" represent alignment, could be one of the values below:
    "center"
    "leading"
    "trailing"
    "top"
    "bottom"
    "topLeading"
    "topTrailing"
    "bottomLeading"
    "bottomTrailing"
*/
$render(
  <vstack frame="max">
    <rect frame="50,30" color="green"></rect>
    <rect frame="50,30" color="blue" corner="5"></rect>
  </vstack>
);
